description_long: This object is a stylized, oversized cannon mounted on a wheeled wooden carriage, positioned behind a short brick or stone barricade. The cannon features a cylindrical barrel with a slightly flared muzzle and a rear knob, and is supported by two large spoked wheels on either side. A long ramrod or cleaning rod is propped up against the carriage, and two polygonal ammunition crates or boxes are placed nearby on the tiled ground. The barricade consists of two thick, rectangular walls with a brick pattern, providing cover for the cannon. The entire setup is situated on a flat, tiled base, suggesting a defensive emplacement in an urban environment.
description: A large, wheeled cannon sits behind a brick-patterned barricade, with ammunition crates and a ramrod nearby on a tiled base.
description_view_0: Front view shows the cannon barrel facing forward between two brick-patterned barricade walls.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the full length of the cannon barrel, carriage wheels, ramrod, and nearby ammunition crates.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the cannon and carriage, with the barricade walls framing the scene.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlights the cannon's profile, wheels, and the arrangement of crates and ramrod.
